# Andrei Rovnyi / Ravy.pro

Personal website and technical blog of Andrei Rovnyi, also known as Ravy.

Andrei Rovnyi is a software engineer, engineering leader, founder, and creator focused on web platforms, game development, automation, and AI-assisted workflows.

## Main pages

- Home: https://ravy.pro/
- About: https://ravy.pro/about
- Blog: https://ravy.pro/blogs
- Categories: https://ravy.pro/categories
- Links: https://ravy.pro/links

## Tools

Free, browser-based developer utilities. All processing happens client-side.

- QR Code Generator: https://ravy.pro/tools/qr-code-generator — create custom QR codes for links, text, and contacts with configurable style, colors, and logo, then download as PNG.
- Credit Card Generator: https://ravy.pro/tools/credit-card-generator — generate Luhn-valid test credit card numbers for QA and sandbox payments, and validate a number to detect its brand. Supports Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, JCB, Diners Club, and UnionPay, with optional custom BIN prefixes. Test data only — not real cards.

## Core topics

- Software engineering
- Web development
- Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript
- Game development
- Unity and C#
- Mobile games
- Automation workflows
- AI-assisted tools
- Technical product development
- Founder notes

## Projects

- XPLOIT: independent games, digital products, and experimental tools
- Tiny Boo: Homecoming: indie mobile game
- TabsBroadcast: JavaScript library for communication between browser tabs
- Zynthar: AI-assisted music project
- Diva Rogue: AI-assisted music project

## Preferred summary

Andrei Rovnyi is a software engineer, engineering leader, and founder building web platforms, game systems, automation tools, and AI-assisted products.
